# Getting Support for ZYNC Desktop Application

Welcome to ZYNC support! This document will help you find the right resources
for your questions, issues, or feedback.

---

## 📚 Documentation

**Start here for most questions!**

Our documentation covers installation, configuration, features, and
troubleshooting:

| Resource | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [📖 Documentation Site](https://docs.zync.app) | Full documentation, guides, and tutorials |
| [🚀 Getting Started](https://docs.zync.app/getting-started) | Quick start guide for new users |
| [⚙️ Configuration Guide](https://docs.zync.app/configuration) | Settings and customization options |
| [🔧 Troubleshooting](https://docs.zync.app/troubleshooting) | Solutions to common problems |
| [❓ FAQ](https://docs.zync.app/faq) | Frequently asked questions |
| [📝 Release Notes](https://github.com/zync-app/zync/releases) | What's new in each version |

---

## 🤝 Community Support

### GitHub Discussions

**Best for: Questions, ideas, and general conversations**

Our [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/zync-app/zync/discussions) forum
is the best place for:

- ❓ **Q&A**: Ask questions and get help from the community
- 💡 **Ideas**: Share and discuss feature ideas
- 🎉 **Show and Tell**: Share how you're using ZYNC
- 💬 **General**: Open-ended discussions about ZYNC

### Discord Community

**Best for: Real-time chat and quick questions**

Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/zync-community) to:

- Chat with other ZYNC users in real-time
- Get quick answers to simple questions
- Participate in community discussions
- Stay updated on announcements

### Stack Overflow

**Best for: Specific technical programming questions**

For specific technical questions, you can use Stack Overflow with the
[`zync`](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/tagged/zync) tag.

This is ideal for questions like:
- How to integrate ZYNC with specific tools
- API and scripting questions
- Technical implementation questions

---

## 🐛 Bug Reports

**Found a bug? Let us know!**

Before reporting a bug:

1. ✅ Check [existing issues](https://github.com/zync-app/zync/issues) to see
   if it's already reported
2. ✅ Update to the latest version to see if it's already fixed
3. ✅ Check the [troubleshooting guide](https://docs.zync.app/troubleshooting)

To report a bug:

1. Go to [Issues](https://github.com/zync-app/zync/issues/new/choose)
2. Select "🐛 Bug Report"
3. Fill out the form with as much detail as possible
4. Include steps to reproduce, expected behavior, and actual behavior

**Good bug reports include:**
- Detailed reproduction steps
- Expected vs. actual behavior
- Operating system and ZYNC version
- Screenshots or screen recordings
- Relevant log files

---

## ✨ Feature Requests

**Have an idea? We'd love to hear it!**

Before requesting a feature:

1. ✅ Check [existing issues](https://github.com/zync-app/zync/issues) for
   similar requests
2. ✅ Check the [roadmap](https://github.com/orgs/zync-app/projects/1) to see
   if it's planned

To request a feature:

1. Go to [Issues](https://github.com/zync-app/zync/issues/new/choose)
2. Select "✨ Feature Request"
3. Describe the problem you're trying to solve
4. Explain your proposed solution

**Good feature requests include:**
- Clear problem statement ("As a user, I need X because Y")
- Proposed solution
- Alternative solutions considered
- Use cases demonstrating the value

---

## 🔒 Security Vulnerabilities

**Found a security issue? Please report it responsibly.**

⚠️ **DO NOT** create a public issue for security vulnerabilities!

Instead:

1. Use [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/zync-app/zync/security/advisories/new)
   to report privately
2. Or email security@zync.app (PGP key in [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md))

We will:
- Acknowledge receipt within 48 hours
- Provide an initial assessment within 7 days
- Work with you to understand and fix the issue
- Credit you in the advisory (unless you prefer anonymity)

For more details, see our [Security Policy](SECURITY.md).

---

## 📧 Direct Contact

**For matters that don't fit the above channels:**

| Contact | Use For |
|---------|---------|
| support@zync.app | General support inquiries |
| security@zync.app | Security vulnerability reports |
| sponsorship@zync.app | Sponsorship and partnership inquiries |
| press@zync.app | Press and media inquiries |
| legal@zync.app | Legal matters and DMCA notices |

**Response Times:**
- General inquiries: 2-3 business days
- Security issues: 48 hours or less
- Critical issues: We'll do our best to respond ASAP

## 🏢 Enterprise Support

**For businesses requiring dedicated support:**

We offer enterprise support plans that include:

| Feature | Community | Enterprise Basic | Enterprise Premium |
|---------|-----------|------------------|-------------------|
| GitHub Issues | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Community Discord | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Email Support | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Response SLA | Best effort | 48 hours | 4 hours |
| Dedicated Support Channel | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| Priority Bug Fixes | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Custom Feature Development | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| On-site Training | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |

Contact [enterprise@zync.app](mailto:enterprise@zync.app) for pricing and
details.

---

## 🌐 Self-Help Resources

### Log Files

ZYNC logs can help diagnose issues. Find them at:

| Platform | Location |
|----------|----------|
| Windows | `%APPDATA%\ZYNC\logs\` |
| macOS | `~/Library/Logs/ZYNC/` |
| Linux | `~/.config/ZYNC/logs/` |

Or access via: **Help > Open Log Folder** in the app

### Configuration Files

Configuration files are located at:

| Platform | Location |
|----------|----------|
| Windows | `%APPDATA%\ZYNC\config\` |
| macOS | `~/Library/Application Support/ZYNC/` |
| Linux | `~/.config/ZYNC/` |

### Crash Reports

If ZYNC crashes, crash reports are at:

| Platform | Location |
|----------|----------|
| Windows | `%APPDATA%\ZYNC\Crashpad\` |
| macOS | `~/Library/Application Support/ZYNC/Crashpad/` |
| Linux | `~/.config/ZYNC/Crashpad/` |

---

## 📅 Office Hours

We hold regular community office hours where you can ask questions live:

- **When**: Every Thursday at 10:00 AM PST / 6:00 PM UTC
- **Where**: [Zoom link](https://zoom.us/j/zync-office-hours) or Discord voice
- **What**: Live Q&A, demos, and discussions

Subscribe to our [calendar](https://calendar.google.com/calendar/zync) for
updates.

---

## 🔍 Before You Ask

To get help faster:

1. **Search first** - Your question may already be answered
2. **Be specific** - Include versions, steps, and error messages
3. **Show your work** - Explain what you've already tried
4. **Use proper formatting** - Use code blocks for logs and code
5. **Be patient and kind** - Maintainers are volunteers

---

## 📖 Contributing

Want to help others? Consider contributing!

- Answer questions in [Discussions](https://github.com/zync-app/zync/discussions)
- Help triage issues
- Improve documentation
- Submit bug fixes
- Develop new features

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) for guidelines.

---

## 🙏 Thank You

Thank you for using ZYNC and being part of our community! Your feedback,
bug reports, and contributions help make ZYNC better for everyone.
